name: acc-evc
description: ACC EVC-adaptive recall: when retrieved top-k is dominated by lexically similar but conflicting memories, the --evc-adaptive flag detects the conflict and re-ranks to surface the disambiguating (most recent / decision-tagged) memory which has weaker BM25 overlap.
remembers: Bob's coffee order is a flat white
Bob's coffee order is an americano
Bob's coffee order is a cappuccino
Bob's coffee order is an espresso
Bob's coffee order is a macchiato
Bob switched his coffee order to an oat milk latte this week (most recent update)
Alice prefers green tea in the morning
The team standup is at 10am every Tuesday
